question: Q-learned-gate-privateid-hardhop
body: Can a train-only learned hop/role gate over separate anchor, evidence, and n-ary bridge views beat the equal-compute early scalar on 2Wiki and a second benchmark under private-ID plus direct-edge deletion, across three seeds, without more than 0.01 regression on two-support questions?
reason_prediction_not_registered: The next harness and its script hash are not frozen; only the falsifiable frontier question is opened.
